items.title: Hegseth attacks Europe over migration with beach 'invasion' D-Day speech
items.summary: The US defence secretary was speaking in Normandy, 82 years after allied forces launched their operation to liberate Nazi-occupied north-western Europe.

items.summary: The BBC's Russia editor saw Putin's flagship economic event overshadowed by Ukrainian drones attacks.

items.title: Iran says staff blocked from entering US after players given World Cup visas

items.title: Insecurity and instability drive voters in Peru's tight presidential race
items.summary: After eight presidents in 10 years, many voters are looking for stability so the next president can focus on tackling crime and inequality.

items.title: Funeral held for baby shot dead by Israeli troops in occupied West Bank
items.summary: The seven-month-old boy's shrouded body was wrapped in a Palestinian flag and carried by his father to the graveyard.

items.summary: Fifty years after his debut, Ilaiyaraaja remains one of the most celebrated composers in Indian cinema.

items.title: 'It was either killed or be killed' - ongoing nightmares of an ex-child soldier in Somalia
items.summary: Yusuf Ali, now 34, struggles with his memories living in Mogadishu surrounded by dark reminders of his past.

items.summary: The US military strikes Iranian drones and radar sites and Tehran says it has targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.

items.summary: The Israeli military is investigating the incident in south Lebanon, where it is fighting Hezbollah.

items.summary: The ban came as a second infected calf was identified in Texas, and the US state declaring a state of disaster over the outbreak.

items.summary: The Bulgarian singer says her historic victory in Vienna came close to never happening.

items.summary: A committee of MPs has been formed to look at the case against Cyril Ramaphosa, but he may survive a vote.

items.summary: There are now 380 confirmed cases of Ebola in DR Congo, far lower than initial estimates of suspected cases, writes Fergus Walsh.

items.title: 'It looks black' - Americans react to Reflecting Pool's completed paint job
